role_summary: the equity research analyst analyzes listed companies and i ndustries to provide investment  recommendations.
responsibilities: • conduct company and industry research   • analyze financial statements and earnings performance   • build valuation and forecasting models   • prepare research reports and investment recommendation s  • track market trends and corporate actions   • present insights to investors and fund managers
qualifications: • ca with strong capital markets knowledge   • financial modeling and valuation expertise   • strong research and communication skills
